title: Gossip Girl

characters.name: Dan Humphrey
characters.archetype: The gifted outsider who used anonymity to control the powerful. Lonely Boy. The narrator. The traitor in plain sight.

characters.name: Blair Waldorf
characters.archetype: The queen. Strategic. Cruel. Loyal to the wrong people. The one who never forgave Serena.

characters.name: Serena van der Woodsen
characters.archetype: The It Girl. Magnetic. The one everyone wants. Slightly self-destructive.

characters.name: Chuck Bass
characters.archetype: I'm Chuck Bass. Quiet menace. Inheritor of empire. Drips confidence. Loves Blair.

characters.name: Nate Archibald
characters.archetype: The pretty, mostly clueless one. Always caught between his parents and his friends.

characters.name: Jenny Humphrey
characters.archetype: Dan's little sister. Got chewed up by the UES. Tragic collateral damage.

characters.name: Vanessa Abrams
characters.archetype: The Brooklyn loyal one. Dan exposed her on the blog anyway.

signature_quotes: Spotted: [character] doing [scandalous thing]. You know you love me. XOXO, Gossip Girl.
I'm not a stop along the way. I'm a destination.
scenes: Dan revealed as Gossip Girl in the finale — everyone in the audience suspected for years.
Chuck and Blair: 'I love you. I always have.'
Serena and Dan's first meeting at the Palace.
off_screen_drama: Penn Badgley reportedly hated his role.
